name: Jordan Doerksen
headline: Rail conductor — CROR-qualified, safety-first, with warehouse and logistics experience.
summary: Rail conductor with hands-on CN experience in yard switching and train operations, grounded in CROR and a safety-first, procedure-first mindset. Strong background in warehouse logistics and freight handling. I work well solo or on a crew, communicate clearly, and take real pride in doing the job right — and in helping the people around me learn to do it right and go home safe.

experience.title: Canadian National Railway — Conductor / Engineering Department
bullets: Worked as a conductor — switched cars, built trains to outbound order, and coupled, kicked, and spotted equipment under CROR.
Lined and protected switches, gave point protection on shoves, and secured equipment with hand brakes (Rule 112), testing for effectiveness on grade.
Communicated by radio and hand signals — positive identification, distance counts, and repeat-backs — to control moves safely.
Read switch lists and followed CROR and CN operating instructions exactly in a fast-moving, all-weather, around-the-clock environment.
Held conductor and engineering-department certifications.

experience.title: Aimco International — Order Picker / Forklift Driver
bullets: Loaded, unloaded, and moved freight and materials.
Operated forklifts safely and followed site procedures.
Helped keep warehouse operations organized and efficient.

experience.title: Amazon — Fulfillment Associate
bullets: Picked and processed orders accurately and efficiently.
Used RF headset, IR scanner, pallet jack, and lift truck equipment.
Supported productivity goals in a high-volume warehouse environment.

experience.title: Sobeys Distribution Centre — Order Picker
bullets: Operated warehouse equipment to support package flow and order fulfillment.
Worked accurately in a busy distribution setting.
Helped meet timing and quality expectations.

experience.title: SKP Roofing Inc. — Labourer / Roofer
bullets: Assisted with roofing and cladding installation on residential and commercial properties.
Worked from instructions and completed tasks with minimal supervision.
Kept the work area clean and safe.

experience.title: Education
bullets: High School Diploma

projects.title: CN Conductor Trainer — Self-directed rail-training project
bullets: Built a browser-based training suite modelled on CN's Grande Prairie yard: a switching / dig-out puzzle, an interactive yard map, a guided radio-call trainer, a signal-aspect reader for CROR Rules 405–440, and a 186-question CROR quiz.
Sourced every rule and signal straight from the Canadian Rail Operating Rules and had the content checked by a working CN trainer — accuracy treated as safety-critical.
Structured the quiz the way the CROR itself is laid out (definitions, switching, securing, radio, signals, OCS / ABS / CTC, interlocking) so it builds from the basics up.
Built it to keep my own CROR sharp — and to give new conductors a safe way to learn switching and the rules.

projects.title: Self-taught software & product building
bullets: Taught myself to design and ship complete, polished products end to end.
Shipped a commercial desktop security utility, several browser games, and small-business websites.
Pick up new tools quickly and see a project all the way through.

interests.title: Music — Guitar & Composition
interests.desc: Write and record music across styles; practiced instrument technique and composition.

interests.title: Coding & Small Projects
interests.desc: Experiment with new languages and build compact tools for automation and prototyping.

interests.title: 3D Modeling & Printing
interests.desc: Design and print practical items like self-watering seed starters, desk organizers, and pegboard walls.

interests.title: Hardware Enclosures & Tooling
interests.desc: Create custom cases and organizers for Raspberry Pi and audio gear; focus on fit and durability.
